Book direct and you pay exactly what we quote — no agents, no booking fees, ever.

good to know

Frequently asked

Check-in & check-out?

Check-in from 2pm, check-out by 10am. Arriving early or leaving late? Tell us — we'll mind your bags and the garden's always open to you.

Is breakfast included?

Always. A proper made-from-scratch breakfast under the vine, 7 to 10, from the garden where we can. Dietary things are no trouble — just tell us.

Is parking easy?

Free and easy, right outside. The village is tiny — once you've parked you likely won't need the car again until you leave.

Are children & dogs welcome?

Over-8s in most rooms, all ages in the Stoep Suite. Well-behaved dogs stay in the Stoep Suite too, for a small charge — Biscuit will be delighted.

Cancellation policy?

Free cancellation up to 48 hours before arrival on every direct booking, with a full refund. Because you book straight with us, there's nothing layered on top.

MMarmalade House

A five-room guesthouse in a restored 1873 parsonage in Prince Albert, in the heart of the Karoo. Sunny rooms, a fig garden, and very good breakfast.

The house

Notes from the kitchen

Open dates, the odd recipe, and when the figs are ripe. Once a month, never more.
